---
title: 'A little ditty I was singing in the kitchen...'
date: '2018-06-17T04:21:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Random'
  - 'Randomness'
---

<br />
I can't recall the words to...<br />
<br />
This song that's stuck in my head...<br />
<br />
I must know the words, to this stupid song, or I can't go to bed...<br />
<br />
It's the <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IwH9YvhPN7c" target="_blank">Circle of Life</a>...<br />
<br />
Oh yeah, that's right, the Lion King...<br />
<br />
It's Elton John... At the height of his career...<br />
<br />
Good Night!<br />
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">
